{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/30854794?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/YLChen-007/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/YLChen-007/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/YLChen-007/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/YLChen-007/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/YLChen-007", "id": 30854794, "login": "YLChen-007", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjMwODU0Nzk0", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/YLChen-007/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/YLChen-007/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/YLChen-007/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/YLChen-007/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/YLChen-007/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/YLChen-007", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-35633", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-400", "name": "Uncontrolled Resource Consumption"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-770", "name": "Allocation of Resources Without Limits or Throttling"}], "description": "## Summary
Remote media HTTP error bodies were read without a hard size cap before failure handling, allowing unbounded allocation on error responses.

## Affected Packages / Versions
- Package: `openclaw` (npm)
- Affected: < 2026.3.22
- Fixed: >= 2026.3.22
- Latest released tag checked: `v2026.3.23-2` (`630f1479c44f78484dfa21bb407cbe6f171dac87`)
- Latest published npm version checked: `2026.3.23-2`

## Fix Commit(s)
- `81445a901091a5d27ef0b56fceedbe4724566438`

## Release Status
The fix shipped in `v2026.3.22` and remains present in `v2026.3.23` and `v2026.3.23-2`.

## Code-Level Confirmation
- src/media/fetch.ts now routes non-2xx failures through bounded prefix reads instead of buffering the whole error body.
- src/media/read-response-with-limit.ts enforces capped reads and truncates oversized snippets before surfacing failure text.

OpenClaw thanks @YLChen-007 for reporting.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0036, "percentile": 0.27677}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-4qwc-c7g9-4xcw", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-03-26T19:50:06Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-4qwc-c7g9-4xcw", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-4qwc-c7g9-4xcw"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-35633"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-03-26T19:50:06Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-4qwc-c7g9-4xcw", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/81445a901091a5d27ef0b56fceedbe4724566438", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-35633", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/630f1479c44f78484dfa21bb407cbe6f171dac87", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-unbounded-memory-allocation-via-remote-media-error-responses", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-4qwc-c7g9-4xcw"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-4qwc-c7g9-4xcw", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: Remote media error responses could trigger unbounded memory allocation before failure", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-01T02:41:39Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-4qwc-c7g9-4xcw", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.3.22", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.3.22"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: OpenClaw: Remote media error responses could trigger unbounded memory allocation before failure
